title: erodium cicutarium subsp. romanum
intro: Erodium cicutarium subsp. romanum, also known as redstem storksbill or common stork's-bill, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the geranium family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium subsp. romanum include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. Erodium cicutarium subsp. romanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
